title: arctostaphylos × repens
intro: Arctostaphylos × repens, also known as creeping manzanita, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the family Ericaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which have been found to have various medicinal properties, such as wound healing and antimicrobial activity. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Creeping manzanita can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
